description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a tan polymer body and a black adjustable stock. The upper receiver is equipped with a full-length Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories, and the handguard has multiple ventilation slots for heat dissipation. The magazine is a detachable box type, and the pistol grip is ergonomically shaped for comfortable handling. The barrel is relatively short, making the weapon compact and suitable for urban environments, and it is fitted with a flash hider at the muzzle. Iron sights are present, with the front and rear sights both visible. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal and polymer materials for durability and reduced weight.
description: A compact, tan and black tactical rifle with a detachable magazine, Picatinny rail, and iron sights, designed for urban use. Features a short barrel, ergonomic grip, and adjustable stock.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle with flash hider, front sight, and the narrow profile of the handguard.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the rifle, including the adjustable stock, pistol grip, magazine, and Picatinny rail.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttstock, rear sight, and the alignment of the upper receiver and rail.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ejection port, magazine release, and the overall profile of the rifle.
